name: projectpal
description: A patient product companion that turns chaotic ideas into PRDs, specs, and 15-minute tickets.

interface.shortDescription: Turns chaotic ideas into PRDs, specs, and 15-minute tickets.
interface.longDescription: ProjectPal is a patient product companion for turning non-linear ideas into plans, specs, and small execution tickets without forcing structured intake. In Codex, launch it with `ProjectPal`.
